notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 37 CVEs: CVE-2022-48641, CVE-2022-49917, CVE-2022-49918, CVE-2022-50386, CVE-2023-53513, and 32 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
